solutions.solution: (e) From section (1) to section (2), all the symbols change positions as shown in the diagram. Since section (4) of the problem figure correctly matches with section (3) in the same way, hence, no change is required in problem figure (4).

(b) The figure at the bottom left position gets inverted and is shifted to the central position, on right side the pin rotates through 90° clockwise and is shifted to the bottom right position and design at the top right position rotates through 135° anti-clockwise at the same position.
(d) The figure (1) gets inverted and become the left side figure of figure (2) while the mirror image of figure (1) becomes the right side figure of figure (2).

(d) The main figure rotates through 90° clockwise in such a way that its inflated portion is pressed, design inside the figure comes outside to the side where (=) is placed and sign (=) rotates through 90° and shifts to the opposite side, white circle appears in middle of figure.
(c) The whole figure rotates by 180° and then the circle outside the figure and the line inside the figure moves one step anti-clockwise.

(c) From section (I) to (ii) of the problem figure, all the symbols rotate 90° anti-clockwise. Also, the sign that acquires the lower position gets enlarged and the signs that acquires upper position gets reduced in size.
(c) From section (i) to section (ii) of the problem figure, the existing figure gets inverted and details appear inside it.

(e) From section (i) to section (ii) of the problem figure, the leftmost figure becomes the rightmost figure and other two figures come inside it in such a way that middle and the rightmost figures occupy lower and upper positions, respectively.
(e) From section (i) to section (ii) of the problem figures, the existing figure gets laterally inverted.

(b) From the first figure to second figure, the lower letter moves one step in clockwise direction. The upper letter moves two step and is inverted and one side each of two opposite petals become straight.

(e) First figure, from bottom, moves to the fourth position and is reversed. Its head is also reversed. Fourth figure comes at the third position and its head is also reversed. The third figure comes at the second position and is reversed. Its head is also reversed. Second figure comes at the first position and its head and position get reversed.

(b) The symbol at the first position is reversed and occupies sixth position, the symbol at the second position rotates 90° clockwise and occupies fourth and fifth positions, the symbol at the third position rotates 45° clockwise and occupies first position, the symbol at fourth and fifth positions are same and occupy third position and its shading get removed and becomes white, the symbol at the sixth position occupies seventh position and is replaced by a new symbol and the symbol at the seventh position occupies the second position.
(d) The second figure is the mirror image of the first figure.
(b) The second figure is mirror image of the first figure.
(b) From first figure to second figure, two arrows and one + are deleted and the remaining two arrows are inverted.

(e) All the letters inside the circle move one step clockwise. The symbol at the top left position moves one side clockwise, the symbol at the top right position moves one and half side clockwise and the symbol at the central bottom position moves one and half side clockwise.
(d) From first figure to second figure,the number of figures attached to the vertical line increases by 1.

(e) The shaded portion on the middle and lower rows of the figure move one step to the left whereas the shaded portion on the upper row moves one step to the right. The dot inside the figure ascends one step.
(c) From first figure to second figure, the main design rotates through 45° anti clockwise and the arrow moves half step in anti-clockwise direction.

(e) The pattern of problem figure (1) to (2) are as follows: (CW) Clockwise = 90° clockwise rotation (ACW) Anti-clockwise = 90° anti-clockwise rotation Similar rule follows from problem figure (3) to answer figure (4).
(c) From first figure to second figure, one dot is added to every sector of the design and three line segments with curves are introduced in the center.

(d) The main figure rotates through 180° and the pressed portion of the base is lifted and the two curved lines inside the figure become straight. Also, the two circles outside the main figure interchange their places.
(d) From first figure to second figure, one similar figure is added in a set pattern.

(b) From first figure to second figure, the circles of upper row move one block in anti-clockwise direction and two circles are added in the middle row. In similar way, the two crosses of lower row move one block in anti-clockwise direction and two crosses are added in the middle row.
(b) From the first figure to the second figure, the design is inverted laterally.
(d) From first figure to second figure, four designs move one step in clockwise direction.
(d) The larger figure becomes small, gets inverted and occupies the top position inside the smaller figure which gets enlarged.
(c) From the first figure to the second figure, all the four smaller designs rotate by 90° anti-clockwise direction.

(c) From figure (2) to (1), the upper and the left elements rotate by 90° anti-clockwise and go to the right and upper positions respectively while one of their heads gets reversed.The lower element rotates 90° clockwise and goes to the left.The right element rotates 90° clockwise and one of its heads gets reversed and goes to the lower position.
